subcodes.first_line: O how sweet was that fragrance when it wafted forth! Blessed was the moment when this evanescent servant attained unto the presence of that spiritual friend's book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حبذا ذاک الشذا حین هبت مبارک وقتی این خادم فانی بزیارت کتاب آنحبیب روحانی که
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
